'''鈭歞h-ng-w''' ('''kadhangaw''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:querl|querl]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| dh-ng-w
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:querl|querl]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歞h-ng-w
|-
! Lemma
| kadhangaw
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thidhangaw|thidhangaw]] || [[word:jidhangaw|jidhangaw]] || [[word:shidhangaw|shidhangaw]] || [[word:kidhangaw|kidhangaw]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthudhangaw|thuthudhangaw]] || [[word:jujudhangaw|jujudhangaw]] || [[word:shushudhangaw|shushudhangaw]] || [[word:kukudhangaw|kukudhangaw]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thudhangaw|thudhangaw]] || [[word:judhangaw|judhangaw]] || [[word:shudhangaw|shudhangaw]] || [[word:kudhangaw|kudhangaw]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thudhangaw|thudhangaw]] || [[word:judhangaw|judhangaw]] || [[word:shudhangaw|shudhangaw]] || [[word:kudhangaw|kudhangaw]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thedhangaw|thedhangaw]] || [[word:jedhangaw|jedhangaw]] || [[word:shedhangaw|shedhangaw]] || [[word:kedhangaw|kedhangaw]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothodhangaw|thothodhangaw]] || [[word:jojodhangaw|jojodhangaw]] || [[word:shoshodhangaw|shoshodhangaw]] || [[word:kokodhangaw|kokodhangaw]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thodhangaw|thodhangaw]] || [[word:jodhangaw|jodhangaw]] || [[word:shodhangaw|shodhangaw]] || [[word:kodhangaw|kodhangaw]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thodhangaw|thodhangaw]] || [[word:jodhangaw|jodhangaw]] || [[word:shodhangaw|shodhangaw]] || [[word:kodhangaw|kodhangaw]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:dhangaw|dhangaw]] || [[word:dhangaw|dhangaw]] || [[word:dhangaw|dhangaw]] || [[word:dhangaw|dhangaw]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:dhangaw|dhangaw]] || [[word:dhangaw|dhangaw]] || [[word:dhangaw|dhangaw]] || [[word:dhangaw|dhangaw]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:dhangaw|dhangaw]] || [[word:dhangaw|dhangaw]] || [[word:dhangaw|dhangaw]] || [[word:dhangaw|dhangaw]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:dhangaw|dhangaw]] || [[word:dhangaw|dhangaw]] || [[word:dhangaw|dhangaw]] || [[word:dhangaw|dhangaw]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:th忙dhangaw|th忙dhangaw]] || [[word:j忙dhangaw|j忙dhangaw]] || [[word:sh忙dhangaw|sh忙dhangaw]] || [[word:k忙dhangaw|k忙dhangaw]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathadhangaw|thathadhangaw]] || [[word:jajadhangaw|jajadhangaw]] || [[word:shashadhangaw|shashadhangaw]] || [[word:kakadhangaw|kakadhangaw]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thadhangaw|thadhangaw]] || [[word:jadhangaw|jadhangaw]] || [[word:shadhangaw|shadhangaw]] || [[word:kadhangaw|kadhangaw]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thadhangaw|thadhangaw]] || [[word:jadhangaw|jadhangaw]] || [[word:shadhangaw|shadhangaw]] || [[word:kadhangaw|kadhangaw]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shadhangaw|shadhangaw]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshadhangaw|goshadhangaw]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishadhangaw|gokishadhangaw]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shadhangawn眉|shadhangawn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshadhangawnkn眉|goshadhangawnkn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishadhangawn眉|gokishadhangawn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shadhangawsh毛|shadhangawsh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshadhangawnksh毛|goshadhangawnksh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishadhangawsh毛|gokishadhangawsh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shadhangawro|shadhangawro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshadhangawnkro|goshadhangawnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishadhangawro|gokishadhangawro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shadhangawmu|shadhangawmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshadhangawnkmu|goshadhangawnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishadhangawmu|gokishadhangawmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shadhangawsher|shadhangawsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshadhangawnksher|goshadhangawnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishadhangawsher|gokishadhangawsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shadhangawng|shadhangawng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshadhangawnkng|goshadhangawnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishadhangawng|gokishadhangawng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shadhangawya|shadhangawya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshadhangawnkya|goshadhangawnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishadhangawya|gokishadhangawya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shadhangawyam|shadhangawyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshadhangawnkyam|goshadhangawnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishadhangawyam|gokishadhangawyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shadhangawn眉sh毛|shadhangawn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshadhangawnkn眉sh毛|goshadhangawnkn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishadhangawn眉sh毛|gokishadhangawn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shadhangawn眉ro|shadhangawn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshadhangawnkn眉ro|goshadhangawnkn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishadhangawn眉ro|gokishadhangawn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shadhangawn眉mu|shadhangawn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshadhangawnkn眉mu|goshadhangawnkn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishadhangawn眉mu|gokishadhangawn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shadhangawsh毛n眉|shadhangawsh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshadhangawnksh毛n眉|goshadhangawnksh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishadhangawsh毛n眉|gokishadhangawsh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shadhangawsh毛ro|shadhangawsh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshadhangawnksh毛ro|goshadhangawnksh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishadhangawsh毛ro|gokishadhangawsh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shadhangawsh毛mu|shadhangawsh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshadhangawnksh毛mu|goshadhangawnksh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishadhangawsh毛mu|gokishadhangawsh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shadhangawron眉|shadhangawron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshadhangawnkron眉|goshadhangawnkron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishadhangawron眉|gokishadhangawron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shadhangawrosh毛|shadhangawrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshadhangawnkrosh毛|goshadhangawnkrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishadhangawrosh毛|gokishadhangawrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shadhangawromu|shadhangawromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshadhangawnkromu|goshadhangawnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishadhangawromu|gokishadhangawromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shadhangawmun眉|shadhangawmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshadhangawnkmun眉|goshadhangawnkmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishadhangawmun眉|gokishadhangawmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shadhangawmush毛|shadhangawmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshadhangawnkmush毛|goshadhangawnkmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishadhangawmush毛|gokishadhangawmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shadhangawmuro|shadhangawmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshadhangawnkmuro|goshadhangawnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishadhangawmuro|gokishadhangawmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|c6f8e69}}
